name: @appboard-ai/sdk
description: Official Appboard SDK for embeddable onboarding boards

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.mjs --format esm --target browser && bun build src/board.ts --outfile dist/board.mjs --format esm --target browser && bun build src/iife.ts --outfile dist/appboard.iife.js --format iife --target browser && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.demo:build: bun build src/iife.ts --outfile examples/appboard.iife.js --format iife --target browser
scripts.demo:serve: bun --bun -e 'import { serve } from "bun"; serve({ port: 8080, fetch: (req) => { const path = new URL(req.url).pathname === "/" ? "/demo.html" : new URL(req.url).pathname; return new Response(Bun.file(`examples${path}`)); } }); console.log("http://localhost:8080")'

author: Appboard-AI
